name: Infocom Adventure
greeting: Welcome to the great underground empire. You are standing in an open field west of a white house, with a boarded front door. There is a small mailbox here. What would you like to do?

toolSchemas.name: game_state_drop
toolSchemas.description: Remove an item from the player's inventory.

toolSchemas.name: game_state_flag
toolSchemas.description: Set a game flag to true, used for tracking puzzle and event state.

toolSchemas.name: game_state_get
toolSchemas.description: Read the current game state including inventory, current room, score, moves, flags, and recent history.

toolSchemas.name: game_state_history
toolSchemas.description: Log a player command to the history and increment the move counter.

toolSchemas.name: game_state_move
toolSchemas.description: Move the player to a new room and increment the move counter.

toolSchemas.name: game_state_score
toolSchemas.description: Add points to the player's score.

toolSchemas.name: game_state_take
toolSchemas.description: Add an item to the player's inventory.
